name: golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev
title: golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev
summary: low-level access to Linux netlink sockets (library)
description:
low-level access to Linux netlink sockets (library)
The netlink package provides low-level access to Linux netlink sockets.
.
For more information about how netlink works, check out blog series on Linux,
Netlink, and Go
(https://mdlayher.com/blog/linux-netlink-and-go-part-1-netlink/).
